title: BEM-547 Claude external audit report
objective:
Run script:
"""
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
pending = Path('governance/tasks/pending')
pending.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')

report_path = reports / 'bem547_claude_external_audit_system_state_report.md'
roadmap_path = pending / 'BEM547_NEXT_DEVELOPMENT_CONTOURS_ROADMAP_FOR_CLAUDE.md'
proof_path = proofs / 'bem547_claude_external_audit_report.txt'

# Repository evidence inventory.
key_files = [
  'governance/internal_contour/curator_intake_contract.md',
  'governance/protocols/PROVIDER_PROBE_BEFORE_RESERVE.md',
  'governance/protocols/PROVIDER_CONTOUR_FAILOVER_CONTRACT.md',
  'governance/protocols/TELEGRAM_OUTBOX_SENDER_CONTRACT.md',
  'governance/protocols/TELEGRAM_LIVE_SETUP_OPERATOR_ACTIONS.md',
  'governance/state/role_cycle_state.json',
  'governance/state/contour_status.json',
  'governance/state/provider_contour_state.json',
  'governance/transport/results.jsonl',
  'governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl',
  '.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml',
  '.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml',
  '.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml',
  '.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml',
  'scripts/telegram_outbox_pick.py',
  'scripts/telegram_delivery_record.py'
]
file_rows = ''
for name in key_files:
    p = Path(name)
    file_rows += '| `' + name + '` | ' + str(p.exists()) + ' | ' + str(len(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else 0) + ' |
'

# Transport summaries for recent BEM cycles.
cycles = ['bem540-full-system-autotest','bem541-corrected-full-system-retest','bem542-practical-e2e','bem543-corrected-curator-orchestrator-test','bem544-live-telegram-sender','bem546-live-delivery-verification']
cycle_counts = {}
delivery_sent_count = 0
delivery_total_count = 0
provider_selection_count = 0
orchestrator_decision_count = 0
if transport.exists():
    for line in transport.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines():
        if not line.strip():
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads(line)
        except Exception:
            continue
        cid = rec.get('cycle_id')
        if cid in cycles:
            if cid not in cycle_counts:
                cycle_counts[cid] = {}
            rt = str(rec.get('record_type'))
            cycle_counts[cid][rt] = cycle_counts[cid].get(rt, 0) + 1
        if rec.get('record_type') == 'telegram_delivery_result':
            delivery_total_count += 1
            if rec.get('status') == 'sent':
                delivery_sent_count += 1
        if rec.get('record_type') == 'provider_selection_decision':
            provider_selection_count += 1
        if rec.get('record_type') == 'role_orchestrator_decision':
            orchestrator_decision_count += 1

cycle_rows = ''
for cid in cycles:
    cycle_rows += '| `' + cid + '` | `' + json.dumps(cycle_counts.get(cid, {}), ensure_ascii=False) + '` |
'

# Workflow checks.
workflow_files = ['.github/workflows/curator-hourly-report.yml','.github/workflows/telegram-outbox-sender.yml','.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml','.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml','.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml']
workflow_rows = ''
for name in workflow_files:
    p = Path(name)
    txt = p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
    low = txt.lower()
    workflow_rows += '| `' + name + '` | ' + str(p.exists()) + ' | ' + str('workflow_dispatch' in low) + ' | ' + str('schedule:' in low) + ' | ' + str('0 * * * *' in txt) + ' | ' + str('continue-on-error: true' in low) + ' | ' + str('#31' in low or 'issue_number: 31' in low) + ' |
'

# Roadmap proposal for Claude approval.
roadmap_path.write_text('# BEM-547 | Next Development Contours Roadmap for Claude Review

Дата: 2026-05-17 | 14:44 (UTC+3)

## Цель
Согласовать следующий план развития контуров системы разработки после серии BEM-531/BEM-535/BEM-541/BEM-543/BEM-546.

## Предлагаемый следующий план

| Этап | Название | Цель | PASS-критерий |
|---|---|---|---|
| BEM-548 | Live Telegram delivery confirmation | Дождаться/проверить реальный `telegram_delivery_result.status=sent` после запуска `curator-hourly-report.yml` | Transport содержит `status=sent`, сообщение реально доставлено |
| BEM-549 | Curator runtime intake hardening | Превратить curator intake contract в устойчивую обработку pending-задач: validation, dedupe, assignment, final result | Тестовая задача проходит через curator intake без ручной эмуляции цепочки |
| BEM-550 | Role orchestrator workflow alignment | Синхронизировать file-level proven routing logic BEM-543 с `.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml` | Workflow содержит те же правила routing и пишет `role_orchestrator_decision` |
| BEM-551 | Provider adapter live outcome integration | Связать `claude.yml outcome/status` с provider probe/selection decision без forced reserve | Claude active -> Claude, Claude failed/cancelled/timeout -> GPT reserve, все решения audit-recorded |
| BEM-552 | Internal contour live E2E | Провести live practical task: curator intake -> orchestrator workflow -> provider adapter -> role result -> curator closure | Transport/state/report подтверждают не synthetic, а workflow-level цикл |
| BEM-553 | Telegram report quality and throttling | Настроить канонический формат hourly Telegram report, dedupe и throttling | Нет spam, есть hourly status, blocker and next action |
| BEM-554 | Cleanup after test storm | Архивировать test artifacts, устаревшие reports и wrong-direction artifacts без нарушения доказательств | manifest архива, active контур не сломан |

## Вопросы на согласование Claude
| Вопрос | Предложение GPT | Обоснование |
|---|---|---|
| Приоритет | Сначала BEM-548, затем BEM-549/BEM-550 | Live Telegram уже подключён, нужно закрыть delivery proof |
| Orchestrator | Перенести доказанную BEM-543 logic в workflow, не давать external direct dispatch | Архитектура Claude: external -> curator only |
| Provider | Убрать любые forced reserve сценарии без probe evidence | Ошибка BEM-540 уже исправлена BEM-541 |
| Cleanup | Выполнить после стабилизации live E2E | Иначе можно удалить нужные debugging artifacts слишком рано |
')

report_text = '# BEM-547 | Full System State Report for External Audit Claude

report_path.write_text(report_text)

# Update state.
contour = {}
if state_path.exists():
    try:
        contour = json.loads(state_path.read_text())
    except Exception:
        contour = {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:44 (UTC+3)'
contour['bem547_external_audit_report'] = {
  'report': str(report_path),
  'roadmap_for_claude': str(roadmap_path),
  'status': 'READY_FOR_CLAUDE_REVIEW',
  'telegram_delivery_sent_records': delivery_sent_count,
  'telegram_delivery_total_records': delivery_total_count,
  'next_recommended_stage': 'BEM-548 live Telegram delivery confirmation',
  'blocker': None
}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')

# Append report record.
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'external_audit_report_ready','cycle_id':'bem547-claude-external-audit-report','source':'gpt','to_role':'claude_external_auditor','status':'completed','artifact_path':str(report_path),'roadmap_path':str(roadmap_path),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:44 (UTC+3)'}, ensure_ascii=False)+'
')

proof_path.write_text('BEM-547 PASS: Claude external audit report and next roadmap prepared. Report=' + str(report_path) + '
')
changed_files.extend([str(report_path), str(roadmap_path), str(state_path), str(transport), str(proof_path)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-547 prepared full system state report and next roadmap for Claude external audit')
